tagline: Stories that remind us we're not walking alone.
heroDescription: Rooted in Grace is a digital sanctuary for hope, healing, encouragement, faith-based reflection, and honest conversations about mental wellness — held together by community.
partnerBlurb: Rooted in Grace grows through partnership — voices willing to share a story, sponsors who help an episode reach further, and collaborators who bring new gifts to the community.
wellnessDisclaimer: Rooted in Grace offers encouragement and community, not clinical care. If you are struggling, please also reach out to a licensed counselor or a local support line — seeking help is its own act of faith.
